findings.description: 8 JSON targets property names from the `SqlJsonLogFormatter` section are absent from hints: `sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteQueryTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteQueryTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteUpdateTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteUpdateTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.startExecuteBatchTargets`, `sqlLogFormatter.endExecuteBatchTargets`. Only `startRetrieveTargets` and `endRetrieveTargets` are included; the other eight are missing despite being property names defined in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source defines all 10 `*Targets` properties under the `SqlJsonLogFormatter` 記述ルール section. The knowledge file hints include `sqlLogFormatter.startRetrieveTargets` and `sqlLogFormatter.endRetrieveTargets` but omit the remaining 8.

findings.description: The h2 source section `使用方法` contains >= 2000 characters of plain text and has 2 h3 sub-sections (`SQLログの設定` and `JSON形式の構造化ログとして出力する`), but the knowledge file maps everything into a single section `s1` without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source has two `~~` (h3) headings: `SQLログの設定` and `JSON形式の構造化ログとして出力する`, both with extensive property tables, placeholder lists, and code examples. Combined plain text far exceeds 2000 characters.
